content.situation: 医生在问你是否有长期的健康问题或日常习惯影响健康
content.speakerText: Do you have any ongoing health issues or habits that might affect your well-being?
content.speakerTextCn: 你有没有长期的健康问题或可能影响健康的习惯？
content.responseTemplate: I ___ asthma, but I manage it well. I don't smoke, and I try to avoid stress.
content.hint: 描述当前存在的状况，用一般现在时
content.knowledgePoint: 表达当前健康状况的动词使用

content.situation: 医生询问你是否对药物或食物有过敏反应
content.speakerText: Have you ever had a reaction to any medicine or food?
content.speakerTextCn: 你有没有对任何药物或食物产生过反应？
content.responseTemplate: Yeah, I ___ to shellfish — it makes my throat swell up.
content.hint: 表达过敏的固定搭配是 'be allergic to'

content.situation: 医生想了解你是否曾经有不良生活习惯但已改变
content.speakerText: Have you ever had habits like smoking, heavy drinking, or poor sleep?
content.speakerTextCn: 你曾经有过吸烟、酗酒或睡眠不佳这类习惯吗？
content.responseTemplate: I ___ smoking for years, but I stopped two years ago.
content.hint: 表示过去有但现在已停止的习惯，用 'used to'
content.knowledgePoint: 表达过去习惯但已改变的句型
